_instructions: Copy this object into custom-node-list.json in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI-Manager
author: THE-ANGEL-AI
title: LTX-2 MultiGPU (Hybrid Split for 2×T4 / Kaggle)
description: Hybrid Multi-GPU split loader for LTX 2.3 GGUF on 2×T4 (Kaggle). Replaces DisTorch2 regex splitting with explicit block-aware sharding — distributes 44 DiT transformer blocks across 2 GPUs with forward-hook hidden-state transfer. 6 nodes: Разделитель модели (HybridSplitLoader), Загрузчик промптов (GemmaHybridLoader), Диагностика видеопамяти (MemoryDiagnostics), Переключатель стратегии (DeviceStrategy), Парковка видеопамяти (VRAMParking), Патч SageAttention (T4). Requires ComfyUI-GGUF (city96). Optimised for Kaggle T4×2 (2×14.5 GB VRAM, 29 GB RAM). Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 GGUF compatible. MIT→GPL-3.0-or-later.
